headline: AI for Virtual Reality: Immersive Content Generation, Intelligent NPCs, and Adaptive Environments
description: AI is building the metaverse -- generating 3D worlds from text descriptions, powering NPCs that converse naturally, and enabling controller-free interaction through computer vision. From text-to-3D generation to real-time photorealistic rendering, AI bridges the gap between imagination and immersive experience.

citation.name: NVIDIA GET3D: A Generative Model of High Quality 3D Textured Shapes from Images
